sentence_text: The mediastinal main vascular structures and cardiac examination could not be evaluated optimally due to the lack of IV contrast, with notable involvement of the right-sided mediastinal structures.
original_topic: Mediastinal main vascular structures and cardiac examination could not be evaluated optimally because of the lack of IV contrast

sentence_text: The heart contour and size appear normal.
original_topic: Calibration of vascular structures, heart contour and size are natural

sentence_text: The pericardial space appears normal without evidence of effusion.
The right lung upper lobe anterior, middle lobe, and lower lobe anterior-lateral segments show areas of increase in density consistent with consolidation, with air bronchograms observed.
original_topic: In the current examination, there are areas of increase in density consistent with consolidation, which are observed to have newly developed in the right lung upper lobe anterior, middle lobe and lower lobe anterior-lateral segments, in which air bronchograms are also observed

sentence_text: The left lung superior and lingular segments show areas of increased density with indistinct borders, in the appearance of a tree with buds in places, consistent with consolidation.
original_topic: In addition, in the superior and lingular segments of the left lung, there are areas of increased density in the superior lobe of the lower lobe with indistinct borders, in the appearance of a tree with buds in places, consistent with consolidation

sentence_text: The lungs show bilateral areas of increased density consistent with consolidation, with air bronchograms observed.
original_topic: Infective pathologies are considered in the etiology of the findings

sentence_text: Two nodules measuring 6 mm in size are identified in the lower lung fields.
The left lung upper lobe apicoposterior segment and lower lobe posterobasal segment show areas of increased density consistent with consolidation.
original_topic: 5 mm in the current examination (5 mm in the previous CT examination) in the upper lobe apicoposterior segment of the left lung and 14 mm in the long axis in the current examination in the lower lobe posterobasal segment and 10 mm in the previous CT examination were observed
